titleStmt.title: SII 28.175: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 175. (A.R. No. 330 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, On the base of a small shrine in the western prākāra Jaṭāvarmaṉ Sundarapāṇḍya, Year 6, Simha 26
Incomplete and some portions in the middle are lost.

It is stated to be the consolidated record (paṭṭōlai) of the area (under cultivation ?) after leaving out the common land (podu) in several villages or hamlets. While calculating the area a process, maḍakku is referred to, but its significance is not clear.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī § koṟcaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu ciṅka nāyaṟṟu tiyati Irupattāṟān tiyatiThe stone containing the continuation is lost, the number of letters thus lost is not certain. kaṇakku Uttamappiriyaṉ Eḻuttiṭṭa kaṇakkuThe stone containing the continuation is lost, the number of letters thus lost is not certain.
pokam muppattoṉpatāvatu Eḻuttiṭu paṭṭolaippaṭi kaṇṭaṅkuṭi Aṇṭanāyakaviḷākam Uḷḷiṭṭa rūpāy3�ṉāl maṭakku � kiḻ (1/4)mā� tiThe stone containing the continuation is lost, the number of letters thus lost is not certain. ḻ tiruvitiyil vaṭatuṇṭattil Akappaṭa nilam ṉāThe stone containing the continuation is lost, the number of letters thus lost is not certain.
ṉāl potu 7(1/2) nikkinilam ṉāl maṭakku � kiḻ (1/4)mā� kiḻ mukkāl� Ippaṭikku Ivai Uttamappiriyaṉ Eḻuttu mituṉikkuṭi nilam � ṉāl maṭakku � kiḻThe stone containing the continuation is lost, the number of letters thus lost is not certain. (1/4)The stone containing the continuation is lost, the number of letters thus lost is not certain. � koyililpūṇṭi rūpāy 2mukkāl gha ṉāl maṭakku � kiḻThe stone containing the continuation is lost, the number of letters thus lost is not certain.
mukkāle Arai mā muṉtirikai Itil kaṇṭarātittaṉ(v) vāykkāl Iṭittiḻa 8 nilam gha� ṉāl maṭakku kiḻiṉkiḻ (1/4)mā cukiḻ (1/4)mā� nikki kiḻ mukkāl�1muntiri ṉāl maṭakku A� kiḻThe stone containing the continuation is lost, the number of letters thus lost is not certain. �ramaṅkalam rūpāy (1/2) ṉāl maṭakku 1muntiri kiḻ (1/4)tma� kiḻ rūpāy� tma
nakkamantakkuṭi nila Iṭittiḻa 8 nikki taṭi Iraṇṭiṉāl rūpāy (1/2)mā ṉāl maṭakku kiḻ (1/4)mā kiḻ (1/2)� ṉāl potu 2mukkāl 2mā tma tiruvekkaḷam rūpāy 4 ṉāl maṭakku � kiḻ mukkāl mā tma ø kiḻ (1/2)� ṉāl potu maṭakku � kiḻ (1/4) 1kāṇi � kiThe stone containing the continuation is lost, the number of letters thus lost is not certain.
rūpāy Orumā � tirunaṭṭamaṅkalam Iṭittiḻavu nikki rūpāy maṭakku rūpāy (1/4) 4mā kiḻ Araiye nālumā mukkāṇi muntirikai kiḻ muṉṟumā Arai Araikkāṇiyiṉāl potu mukkāl mūṉṟumā 6 karuppūr Iṭittiḻavu nikki (1/2)� ṉāl maṭakku �kiḻ (1/2)mā � kiḻ (1/2)�tma kiḻ (1/2) ṉā �The inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 28.175 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
